label: Book Order Entry
description: Core order form: mode toggle, category, venue, instrument, side, quantity, and price fields.

0.6.note: Pure order-entry form; all form state is synchronous.

0.7.note: !canExecute warning shown; Preview Order button disabled when fields incomplete.

l0.notes: 7 checks pass, 2 N/A (0.6, 0.8 — pure synchronous entry form).

1.1.note: All data via useBookTradeData() — no inline fetch or direct imports.

1.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() and pre-fills form from scope.

1.3.note: Org scope change pre-fills orgId via context useEffect.

1.4.note: Client scope change pre-fills clientId via context useEffect.

1.5.note: Strategy scope change pre-fills strategyId via context useEffect.

1.6.note: Pure order-entry form — no filterable data set to show/hide.

1.7.note: BOOK_VENUES_BY_CATEGORY from lib/config/services/trading.config, DEFI_INSTRUCTION_TYPES and SLIPPAGE_OPTIONS from lib/config/services/defi.config.

l1.notes: All data from useBookTradeData(); scope pre-fill wired in context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea.

3.1.note: Execute mode: live/paper only. Record-only mode: any mode (records off-venue trades). Batch mode: form should be disabled — user is reviewing historical data.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope(). mode not explicitly blocked in form — batch disable is human-verified.

3.3.note: Human must verify Preview Order button is disabled in batch mode.

3.4.note: Human must verify batch indicator visible when mode=batch.

3.5.note: Paper mode: form should work identically to live but route to paper execution. No blocking issue — paper routing in context.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or polling in this widget.

4.1.note: Preview Order onClick calls handlePreview. Buy/Sell buttons call setSide. All handlers wired — no empty onClick.

4.3.note: Human must verify all required fields present for each category (cefi_spot, cefi_futures, defi, tradfi, otc, etc.).

4.4.note: Human must click Preview Order and verify compliance widget appears with correct summary.

4.6.note: canExecute derived from useAuth() in context — not re-checked on every render.

4.7.note: Human must verify mode tabs (Execute/Record Only) and category tabs toggle correctly.

4.8.note: Human must verify scrollable content within widget bounds at defaultH=8.

5.1.note: Serves: CeFi spot/futures/options (cefi_spot, cefi_futures, cefi_options), DeFi (defi), TradFi (tradfi), OTC (otc). Category tabs map directly to asset classes. DeFi category shows SWAP/PROVIDE_LIQUIDITY/STAKE/BRIDGE instruction types.

l5.notes: Strategy coverage documented. Human execution flow 5.2-5.6 deferred.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports. Reference data from lib/config/.

7.4.note: BookOrderFormWidget PascalCase. File kebab-case. useBookTradeData camelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file — all computation in context. No inline object literals in hook deps.

8.1.note: Fixed: text-[10px] → text-caption on all form labels, tab trigger, description spans, footer. text-[11px] → text-caption on warning message. text-[9px] → text-nano on org Badge (footer).

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent, CardHeader, Button, Input, Select, Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, Badge — all from components/ui.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, all inputs have adjacent label elements. No interactive divs. Human: keyboard + screen-reader pass needed.

8.5.note: Human must verify at minW=4, minH=5 and at defaultH=8.

l8.notes: All L8.1 violations fixed (text-[9px] org Badge → text-nano).

keepSeparate.rationale: Order form and compliance preview are separated to allow independent repositioning and to keep the form focused. Merging would create a very tall single widget.

relationships.notes: Drives book-preview-compliance via shared orderState (idle→preview transition on handlePreview). Receives scope from book-hierarchy-bar via shared context.

dataContract.notes: Submits via usePlaceOrder() REST mutation. Compliance check via usePreTradeCheck() REST mutation. Static config from lib/config/services/trading.config and lib/config/services/defi.config.

gaps: Sports/predictions asset class has no dedicated category tab
OTC fields (settlementMethod, settlementCurrency, bilateralTerms, isdaReference) are in context but no OTC-specific UI section rendered in widget
paper mode routing not wired in handleSubmit
coverage.notes: DeFi category covers SWAP/PROVIDE_LIQUIDITY/STAKE/BRIDGE instruction types with SOR and TWAP algos.

knownIssues.note: OTC-specific fields (settlementMethod, settlementCurrency, bilateralTerms, isdaReference) are in context but no OTC section renders in this widget. These fields are surfaced nowhere in the current UI — tracking gap.

findings.description: book-order-form-widget.tsx — multiple text-[10px] on form labels and spans, text-[11px] on warning message, text-[9px] on org Badge
findings.fix: text-[10px] and text-[11px] replaced with text-caption throughout. text-[9px] org Badge replaced with text-nano.

findings.description: book-order-form-widget.tsx:236 — text-[9px] on org ID Badge (footer area)
findings.fix: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano utility (maps to --text-nano: 0.5625rem / 9px from @theme).

findings.description: book-order-form-widget.tsx — ~20 user-visible strings. No i18n applied.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
